description_long: This is a small, modern, single-engine airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage painted in a deep maroon color with gray and black accents. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with slightly swept wings and prominent engine nacelles mounted under each wing. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a large, dark-tinted canopy and multiple side windows, suggesting a multi-seat arrangement. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear appears to be fixed, with visible main gear under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the cockpit. The overall design is compact and aerodynamic, suitable for personal or small business aviation.
description: A compact, maroon and gray low-wing airplane with a streamlined fuselage, enclosed cockpit, and fixed tricycle landing gear. Features a conventional tail and underwing engine nacelles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the airplane's nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical placement of the underwing engine nacelles and landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, cockpit windows, low-mounted swept wing, and the conventional tail with visible landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail section, including the single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the full wingspan and landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, wing, and tail, with the registration marking 'TDN' visible on the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with slightly swept straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-seat configuration and large side windows.
